scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACK,FRONT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd /d backend && node node_modules/nodemon/bin/nodemon.js src/server.js" "node node_modules/wait-on/bin/wait-on tcp:5000 && cd /d frontend && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js"
scripts.test:all: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
